ats_utilities.checker.reporter.check_reporter module¶

check_reporter.py

Info

Defines class CheckReporter with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for checking parameters for methods and functions.

class ats_utilities.checker.reporter.check_reporter.CheckReporter[source]¶

Bases: ICheckReporter

Defines class CheckReporter with attribute(s) and method(s). Standard human-readable report formatter. Mechanism for checking function or method parameters (report).

It defines:

methods:
build_message_format - Builds the final message report.
__str__ - Returns the check reporter as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
build_message_format(report_bundle: CheckerReporterBundle | None = None) → str[source]¶

Builds the final message report for checker.

Parameters:

report_bundle (<CheckerReporterBundle | None>) – Bundle with parameters | None.

Returns:

Formatted message report.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Report bundle must be provided.
